items.title_en: Trump still protected from tax enforcement, but anti-weaponization fund is dead, Blanche says
items.title_zh: 布兰奇说，特朗普仍然免受税收执法，但反武器化基金已经死了

items.title_en: Trump taps housing official Bill Pulte to be US spymaster
items.title_zh: 特朗普任命住房官员比尔·普尔特为美国间谍头目
items.desc_en: The head of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, who pushed for criminal charges against Trump's foes, will step in as acting Director of National Intelligence.
items.desc_zh: 曾对特朗普的敌人提出刑事指控的联邦住房金融局局长将出任代理国家情报总监。

items.title_en: Palo Alto Networks pops 12% on earnings beat as AI fuels cybersecurity urgency
items.title_zh: 人工智能加剧网络安全紧迫性，帕洛阿尔托网络公司 (Palo Alto Networks) 盈利上涨 12%
items.desc_en: The beat comes on lowered expectations, after the company gave disappointing guidance in February that fell short of analyst estimates.
items.desc_zh: 该公司在 2 月份给出了令人失望的指导意见，低于分析师的预期，导致预期下调。

items.title_en: Ulta shares pop as beauty retailer beats Wall Street expectations and hikes earnings outlook
items.title_zh: 随着美容零售商超出华尔街预期并上调盈利前景，Ulta 股价上涨
items.desc_en: Ulta Beauty beat on the top and bottom lines for its fiscal first quarter on Tuesday as CEO Kecia Steelman praised the company's strategy.
items.desc_zh: 周二，Ulta Beauty 第一财季的营收和利润均实现突破，首席执行官 Kecia Steelman 赞扬了该公司的战略。

items.title_en: Pulte appointment as spy chief would give Trump attack dog access to the 'crown jewels'
items.title_zh: 普尔特被任命为间谍头子将使特朗普的攻击犬能够接触到“皇冠上的宝石”
items.desc_en: In his role atop the housing finance agency, Bill Pulte has used his access to mortgage records to refer some top Trump enemies for prosecution.
items.desc_zh: 在担任住房金融机构最高职务期间，比尔·普尔特利用其对抵押贷款记录的访问权，将特朗普的一些头号敌人移交起诉。

items.title_en: Mullin refuses to commit to following court orders for DHS - Politico

items.title_zh: 该创收资产以税收优惠利率提供超过 6% 的收益率
items.desc_en: Investors who can stomach some rate volatility may be poised to pick up solid yield.
items.desc_zh: 能够承受一定程度的利率波动的投资者可能会获得稳定的收益率。

items.title_en: Investor Joe Terranova buys these AI plays with 'strong momentum, strong fundamentals’
items.title_zh: 投资者 Joe Terranova 以“强劲势头、强劲基本面”买入这些人工智能公司
items.desc_en: Investor Brian Belski also shared some recent stock picks on CNBC's 'Halftime Report' on Tuesday afternoon.
items.desc_zh: 周二下午，投资者布莱恩·贝尔斯基 (Brian Belski) 还在 CNBC 的“半场报告”中分享了一些近期的股票精选。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: The tech company announces its new Majorana 2 chip.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技公司宣布推出新的 Majorana 2 芯片。

items.title_en: White House Correspondents' Dinner rescheduled after shooting incident
items.title_zh: 枪击事件后白宫记者晚宴重新安排
items.desc_en: The annual dinner, which was held in April this year, was interrupted when a gunman stormed a security checkpoint.
items.desc_zh: 今年四月举行的年度晚宴因一名枪手冲进安全检查站而中断。

items.title_en: Microsoft says new quantum chip 1,000 times more reliable than predecessor
items.title_zh: 微软称新量子芯片比前代芯片可靠 1000 倍
items.desc_en: The tech giant predicts it will have a quantum computer that can solve commercially useful problems by the end of the decade.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头预测，到本世纪末，它将拥有一台可以解决商业有用问题的量子计算机。

items.title_en: 'They'll fix the building, but not our souls': Sleepy Kyiv neighbourhood hit in Russian strike
items.title_zh: “他们会修复建筑物，但不会修复我们的灵魂”：沉睡的基辅社区在俄罗斯罢工中遭到袭击
items.desc_en: Scenes of devastation greet residents emerging from underground shelters after a major Russian attack.
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯发生重大袭击后，从地下避难所出来的居民看到了满目疮痍的景象。

items.title_en: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets are in 'greed' mode as AI companies seek billions
items.title_zh: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门表示，随着人工智能公司寻求数十亿美元的投资，市场处于“贪婪”模式
items.desc_en: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon's comments come as investors prepare for what will be one of the busiest periods for equity issuance in years.
items.desc_zh: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门发表此番言论之际，投资者正在为多年来股票发行最繁忙的时期之一做准备。

items.title_en: Two arrested after four migrant farm workers killed in Italy minivan fire
items.title_zh: 意大利小型货车火灾中四名农民工丧生，两人被捕
items.desc_en: CCTV images showed two people blocking the van's doors from the outside and throwing liquid inside to start a fire.
items.desc_zh: 闭路电视图像显示，两人从外面堵住货车车门，并向车内扔液体引发火灾。

items.title_en: Microsoft unveils new AI models to lessen reliance on OpenAI and lower costs for developers
items.title_zh: 微软推出新的人工智能模型，以减少对 OpenAI 的依赖并降低开发人员的成本

items.desc_zh: 在 Build 开发者大会上，微软宣布推出一系列生成式 AI 模型，试图打入由 OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Google 控制的市场。

items.desc_zh: Lindsay 和 Craig Foreman 于 2025 年 1 月在一次全球摩托车旅行中被捕。

items.desc_zh: 死亡事件发生前，莫塞尔湾镇发生了一天针对非法移民的暴力抗议活动。

items.title_zh: 星期二是一个重要的初选日。以下是值得关注的重要比赛 - NPR
items.desc_en: Tuesday is a big primary day. Here are key races to watch  NPRRepublicans chase breakthroughs in multiple state primary elections  Fox NewsWhat to know about Tuesday’s primaries in California, New Jer
items.desc_zh: 星期二是一个重要的初选日。以下是值得观看的 NPR 共和党人在多个州初选中寻求突破的关键竞选福克斯新闻关于周二加利福尼亚州和新泽西州初选的了解

items.title_en: Denmark's Mette Frederiksen to form government after months of negotiations
items.title_zh: 丹麦梅特·弗雷德里克森经过数月谈判组建政府
items.desc_en: The leader of Denmark's Social Democratic Party is forming a centre-left coalition minority government, giving her a third term as prime minister.
items.desc_zh: 丹麦社会民主党领导人正在组建一个中左翼联合少数政府，这将让她第三次担任首相。

items.title_en: How 'confused' AI rollout hurts firms and baffles staff
items.title_zh: “混乱”的人工智能推出如何伤害公司并让员工感到困惑
items.desc_en: Some firms are putting pressure on staff to use AI, but have not thought through their AI rollout.
items.desc_zh: 一些公司向员工施加压力，要求其使用人工智能，但并未认真考虑人工智能的部署。

items.title_en: Branda
items.title_zh: Branda
items.desc_en: A fun new way to create & manage brands.
items.desc_zh: 创建和管理品牌的有趣新方式。

items.title_en: OpenAI let ChatGPT aid and abet mass shooters, Florida lawsuit claims
items.title_zh: 佛罗里达州诉讼称 OpenAI 让 ChatGPT 帮助和教唆大规模枪击事件
items.desc_en: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier alleges OpenAI and boss Sam Altman built a 'web of deceit'
items.desc_zh: 佛罗里达州总检察长 James Uthmeier 指控 OpenAI 和老板 Sam Altman 构建了一个“欺骗网”

items.title_en: AI giant Anthropic announces plans to list on US stock market
items.title_zh: AI巨头Anthropic宣布计划赴美上市
items.desc_en: The AI company behind Claude is set to offer the public shares of stock sometime this year.
items.desc_zh: 克劳德背后的人工智能公司将于今年某个时候公开发行股票。

items.title_en: UK banks blocked from cyber AI tool Mythos get offer from rival OpenAI
items.title_zh: 英国银行被阻止使用网络人工智能工具 Mythos 获得竞争对手 OpenAI 的报价
items.desc_en: Nine banks have been offered access to GPT 5.5 Cyber, as fierce rival Anthropic has blocked previews of its tool.
items.desc_zh: 九家银行已获得 GPT 5.5 Cyber​​ 的访问权限，因为激烈的竞争对手 Anthropic 已阻止其工具的预览。

items.title_en: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
items.title_zh: 下一款《使命召唤》游戏的朝鲜入侵设定“有争议”
items.desc_en: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.
items.desc_zh: 开发商 Infinity Ward 表示，这款游戏将“植根于该系列闻名的军事真实性”。

items.title_en: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
items.title_zh: 宝马称人形机器人是汽车制造的“未来”
items.desc_en: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.
items.desc_zh: 宝马正在向欧洲的一家汽车工厂引入人形机器人，其基础是美国的类似项目。

items.title_en: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
items.title_zh: 加州总检察长因 2023 年数据泄露起诉 23andMe 继任者
items.desc_en: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.
items.desc_zh: 司法部长罗布·邦塔 (Rob Bonta) 指控该公司在泄露事件的严重性方面撒了谎。

items.title_en: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam Deck 价格上调 40% 以上，原因是成本上涨
items.desc_en: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
items.desc_zh: 这家游戏巨头表示，掌上电脑没有改变，但上涨反映了“组件成本的现状”

items.title_en: Knock agent for Slack
items.title_zh: Knock agent for Slack
items.desc_en: Build, manage, and ship customer messaging from Slack
items.desc_zh: 从 Slack 构建、管理和发送客户消息

items.title_en: King's College team wins access to cutting-edge Google quantum chip
items.title_zh: 国王学院团队获得尖端谷歌量子芯片的使用权
items.desc_en: King's College London researchers hope the chip will help answer previously unanswerable questions about the most important natural processes.
items.desc_zh: 伦敦国王学院的研究人员希望该芯片能够帮助回答有关最重要的自然过程的先前无法回答的问题。

items.title_en: Meta repeatedly snubs EU body over Facebook and Instagram user bans
items.title_zh: Meta 多次因 Facebook 和 Instagram 用户禁令而冷落欧盟机构
items.desc_en: The BBC has been contacted by hundreds of users who claimed they had been wrongly banned from the sites.
items.desc_zh: 数百名用户联系了 BBC，声称他们被错误地禁止访问这些网站。

items.title_en: Google worker charged with using internal data to make $1.2m on bets
items.title_zh: 谷歌员工被控利用内部数据赚取 120 万美元赌注
items.desc_en: The longtime Google employee was charged in New York for allegedly breaking insider trading laws.
items.desc_zh: 这名谷歌长期员工因涉嫌违反内幕交易法而在纽约受到指控。

items.title_zh: 味道像奶油冻的水果的兴起

items.desc_zh: 番荔枝植物因其耐寒性而受到重视，但出口其精致的果实却很困难。
